acceptance_criteria.text: Generic document/email/table/reviews runs show a human progress overview.
gaps: Authenticated UI smoke covered document agent; email/table/reviews share the same component.

acceptance_criteria.text: Technical runtime columns and JSON are not the primary view.
proof: Runtime columns moved behind technical summary disclosure.
Per-entry JSON remains behind technical journal.
gaps: Technical summary was not visible in the smoke because activeRun was not selected, but technical JSON remained hidden behind details.

acceptance_criteria.text: Result payloads use readable labels for generic outputs.
proof: Browser smoke verified document output labels.

acceptance_criteria.text: Targeted tests, build, and lint pass.
Frontend deployed to production and authenticated UI smoke passes.
Production smoke fixture is cleaned up.

known_gaps: Separate authenticated UI fixtures for email/table/reviews remain future coverage.
